meaning: 利迪泽[捷克斯洛伐克西北部一村庄](或译利迪策)
examples: Look at Sandra Lidice Aldama, who chose to start a small business.
She has since moved back to Lidice where she worked for the Lidice National Committee.
In 1942 Lidice was destroyed as a reprisal for the assassination of senior Nazi official Reinhard Heydrich.
Nearly 180 men were executed there and many women and children from Lidice were murdered in concentration camps.
